name: Festive Ribbon Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3 cups sugar, ¾ cup margarine, and 2/3 cup milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to full boil, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling until the thermometer reaches 234°F (stirring constantly to prevent scorching).
4. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate bits until melted.
5. Add 1 jar marshmallow creme and beat until well blended.
6. Pour into a greased 13 x 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Repeat with remaining ingredients, substituting peanut butter for the chocolate bits.
8. Spread over chocolate layer.
9. Cool at room temperature.
10. Cut into squares.
